name: Universal Lead Intake + Booking + Urgent Call

parameters.name: next_action
parameters.value: ={{$node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.inquiry_type === 'booking' ? 'Confirm booking request and lock time.' : ($node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.inquiry_type === 'urgent-call' ? 'Call back immediately.' : 'Review new inbound lead and qualify.')}}

parameters.name: workflow_name
parameters.value: Universal Lead Intake + Booking + Urgent Call

parameters.name: payload
parameters.value: ={{ { inquiry_type: $json.inquiry_type, service_requested: $json.service_requested, requested_booking_date: $json.requested_booking_date, requested_booking_time: $json.requested_booking_time, booking_needs_confirmation: $json.booking_needs_confirmation, calendar_payload: $json.calendar_payload } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { from: ($env.ALERT_EMAIL_FROM || 'G7CRM Alerts <onboarding@resend.dev>'), to: [$env.ALERT_EMAIL_TO], subject: ($json.inquiry_type === 'urgent-call' ? '[URGENT] ' : ($json.inquiry_type === 'booking' ? '[Booking] ' : '[Lead] ')) + $json.business_name + ' — G7CRM', text: $json.telegram_message } }}
